title: Lost Cities for ModPack
description: Added new generation with others mods.
body:
This offshoot of the Lost Cities mod brings a new generation of buildings to the game. Also, adds new mobs on the floors and changes loot tables. The mod itself uses mobs and items from other mods. Because of what a full list of mods is needed in the future. Lost cities is an extremely flexible mod in the settings. But it doesn't actually use the standard .json config files in the "config" folder.
For deeper editing, you need to open the existing jar file and change the generation and loot in the root json files. And for the modpack, as a result, you need to create a separate modification.

This mod required(Forge version):
[Zombie Extreme](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/zombie-extreme) - latest(1.16.5);
*For mob spawning in building and loot tables*
[Timeless and Classics Guns](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/timeless-and-classic-guns) - 0.2.0.0 RELEASE(1.16.5);
*For loot tables*

Screenshots and dependencies will be added later.
